title: prunus × rybini
intro: Prunus × rybini, also known as Rybina or Plum, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Prunus domestica (European plum) and Prunus cerasifera (cherry plum). Prunus × rybini has been valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Prunus × rybini is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in the production of supplements and topical creams.
